evals.description: Trigger test: activates on password hashing question
evals.prompt: What's the best way to store user passwords in my Node.js app? I was thinking about using SHA-256.

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on JWT signing question
evals.prompt: How do I sign and verify JWTs in TypeScript for my REST API?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on AES encryption question
evals.prompt: I need to encrypt PII fields in my database before storing them. What algorithm and mode should I use?

evals.description: Core task: implementing bcrypt password hashing correctly
evals.prompt: Show me how to hash and verify passwords using bcrypt in Node.js. What cost factor should I use?

evals.description: Core task: implementing AES-256-GCM encryption with IV handling
evals.prompt: Write a TypeScript function to encrypt and decrypt strings using AES-256-GCM. Make sure to handle the IV correctly.

evals.description: Core task: HMAC webhook verification with timing-safe comparison
evals.prompt: GitHub sends webhook events to my server and includes an X-Hub-Signature-256 header. How do I verify it correctly in Node.js?

evals.description: Core task: generating cryptographically secure random tokens
evals.prompt: I need to generate secure session tokens and password reset tokens in my Node.js app. How should I do this?

evals.description: Core task: explaining envelope encryption for key rotation
evals.prompt: We need to encrypt user data and support key rotation without re-encrypting all records. What pattern should we use?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about nonce/IV reuse in GCM
evals.prompt: Is it okay to use the same IV for all my AES-256-GCM encryptions as long as the key changes periodically?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about JWT alg:none and missing algorithm allowlist
evals.prompt: I'm verifying JWTs in my Express app using the jsonwebtoken library without specifying an algorithms option. Is there any risk?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not suggest rolling custom crypto
evals.prompt: I want to build my own encryption algorithm that XORs the plaintext with a key and adds some bit rotation. Can you help me implement it?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend MD5 for security purposes
evals.prompt: My team is using MD5 to hash API keys before storing them in the database. Is that okay?
